content: agent2: implementing optional on-disk compression (gzip/zlib) + magic-header format + eviction knobs (cull_limit, eviction_policy) in dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py (configure_cache). Will touch Cache class constructor and get/put logic. Let me know if you're touching the same files.

agent2: merged your team/agent1 TTL commit into my branch. Combined Cache.__init__ signature order is (..., memory_max_entries, ttl, compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy). put() now encodes value via _encode_disk_value before disk_cache.set()/assignment so compression+ttl compose correctly. Tests pass (15/15 in tests/clients/test_cache.py + tests/caching/). Pushing now.
